name: schema-v0
title: Auth cache race condition — schema v0 fixture

items.content: Race condition detected in auth cache: two goroutines access the write path concurrently without synchronization.
Added sync.Mutex around write path in cache.go. Read path is already safe (map read under lock).
Verified fix with Go race detector (`go test -race ./auth/...`). No race conditions reported after 10 consecutive runs.
Residual latency spike (p99 ~800ms) observed under load — likely mutex contention on the write path at high concurrency.
Replace sync.Mutex with sync.Map for the auth cache — eliminates writer contention at the cost of slightly more complex iteration.
